news.title: 弘易芯科技与某国际品牌深化战略合作
news.titleEn: HYIC Deepens Strategic Partnership with International Brand
news.summary: 近日，弘易芯科技与国际知名元器件品牌达成深度战略合作协议，进一步拓展产品线和市场覆盖。
news.summaryEn: Recently, HYIC reached a deep strategic cooperation agreement with an internationally renowned component brand, further expanding product lines and market coverage.

news.title: 参加2025深圳电子展，展示多款新品方案
news.titleEn: HYIC Participates in 2025 Shenzhen Electronics Fair
news.summary: 弘易芯科技携多款新品方案亮相2025深圳电子展，吸引众多客户关注。
news.summaryEn: HYIC showcased multiple new solutions at the 2025 Shenzhen Electronics Fair, attracting significant customer attention.

news.title: 被动元器件供需与选型技术分享会圆满举办
news.titleEn: Passive Component Supply and Selection Technical Seminar Successfully Held
news.summary: 公司技术团队成功举办被动元器件选型技术分享会，为客户提供专业的技术支持。
news.summaryEn: Our technical team successfully held a passive component selection seminar, providing professional technical support to customers.

news.title: 电源管理IC选型指南与典型应用
news.titleEn: Power Management IC Selection Guide and Typical Applications
news.summary: 本文详细介绍电源管理IC的选型要点与典型应用场景。
news.summaryEn: This article details key points for selecting power management ICs and typical application scenarios.

news.title: 公司2024年度总结与2025展望
news.summary: 回顾2024年的发展成果，展望2025年的发展规划与战略目标。
news.summaryEn: Reviewing the development achievements of 2024 and looking forward to the development plans and strategic goals for 2025.

news.title: 新办公室启用，扩大研发与仓储能力
news.titleEn: New Office Opening, Expanding R&D and Warehousing Capabilities
news.summary: 公司新办公室正式启用，研发与仓储能力得到进一步提升。
news.summaryEn: The company's new office is officially opened, with further improvements in R&D and warehousing capabilities.
